name: Dubb Video Messaging Sales API
what_it_does: Video messaging and sales engagement platform with API — enabling sales and marketing teams to create, share, and track personalized video messages for prospecting and follow-up, with CRM integration, email/LinkedIn delivery, call-to-action buttons, view tracking, and video email landing pages.
use_calls: Querying video view analytics and engagement metrics for sales team performance reporting
Integrating Dubb video engagement signals with CRM for deal health scoring
Automating video message delivery as part of outreach sequences via API
Pulling contact engagement history for personalized follow-up prioritization
Managing video library and templates programmatically for team content consistency
not_for: Professional video hosting and on-demand streaming (use Wistia or Vimeo)
Automated AI video personalization at scale (use Idomoo for data-driven video)
Internal team video communication (use Loom for async team communication)
best_when: A sales or customer success team wants to stand out in prospects' inboxes with personalized video messages that track engagement and integrate with CRM workflow, especially for high-touch outreach.
avoid_when: You need video hosting for marketing content, automated data-driven video personalization at scale, or internal team communication rather than external prospect outreach.

auth.notes: API key from Dubb account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for video view, CTA click, and reply events. Salesforce and HubSpot integrations via native connectors. No OAuth2.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited videos and basic tracking
pricing.notes: Los Angeles-based company. Founded 2017. Bootstrapped with growth funding. All-in-one video sales platform differentiator — record, send, track in single workflow. Dubb video landing pages with CTA buttons. Screen + webcam recording for demos. Chrome extension for Gmail integration. Popular with financial services, real estate, and enterprise sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for videos, contacts, analytics, and tracking events. Bearer token auth. Moderate documentation. Video creation requires Dubb app or Chrome extension — API is primarily for management and analytics. Webhook for engagement events. CRM integrations configured separately.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Video reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Contact reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Video creation requires Dubb app or Chrome extension — not API-recordable
Video tracking requires recipient to click link and allow tracking
GDPR: video view tracking is behavioral data — consent consideration for EU recipients
CRM integrations configured in admin — not API-driven sync
Free tier has branding on video pages — affects sender professionalism

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Video engagement tracking is behavioral PII — GDPR consent for EU recipients. Video content may contain proprietary sales materials — access control required. Contact engagement data requires retention policy.
